entry.title: Re: 🌟 Bem-vindos à nossa Comunidade SAP em Curitiba!
entry.content:
Estou muito feliz em poder participar desta comunidade SAP.

Meu nome é Jeferson Machado Da Silva, sou um gaucho que venho para o Parana estudar e acabou gostando tanto daqui que ficou, resido em uma pequena cidade chamada Palotina.

Trabalho atualmente em uma grande Cooperativa que atua em diversos segmentos, a cinco anos atuo de alguma forma diretamente com os produtos da SAP. Hoje sou Analista de Segurança da Informação com foco na gestão de acessos e identidades SAP.

Espero poder participar de algum evento da comunidade presencial para crescer mais meu networking e poder colaborar com meu conhecimento.

entry.title: Re: Variable Pay - Assistance Needed with Individual Goal...
entry.content:
Hi @JoannaRo 

I need to check but I believe that the field that needs to be used with ABR is performancePercent instead of individualPercent.

Can you share screenshots of how it looks so far ? 

Are you pulling the Ratings from each performance form correctly for each time ? I am surprised because last time I tried a few months ago, Overlap was not giving me the expected results and I had to use startDate and a setting in provisioning to enforce it on the first record to make it work correctly.

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to increase the length of the WBS Desc...
entry.content:
The best practice for your requirement is to create customer defined attributes, and in S/4HANA this is much easier than it used to be.  It's called In-App Extensibility and allows you to create as many additional attributes as you need.  These additional fields can be seen in standard reporting.

Also, in standard SAP there is the long text option next to the WBS Description.   With long text the sky is the limit for adding as much text as you need, but it doesn't show up in standard reporting.

entry.title: MIGO - Goods issue does not recognize Fund Center
entry.content:
Dear colleagues

I am having trouble generating a goods issue in transaction MIGO because, for a specific movement type, the Fund Center is entered manually, but the system ignores it and derives a different one from the FMDERIVE rules. I ran the process with the trace active and noticed that the Fund Center field is coming through as empty, ignoring the one that was entered manually.

Any suggestions on how to address this?

 

 

Thank you in advance for your help!

Kind Regards

Humberto F

entry.title: Re: Jump to ECC from SAC
entry.content:
Hello Joslee,

I have a similar issue. We have created a SAC story on the source "2CCFIMSPLANACT2501" to show our margin analysis statement.

Now the colleagues want to see the details with the line item report on G/L account level. 

The idea was to create a second linked story in which we see the details. But I am not able to create a line item report as a story. The line item report I found are always provided via ODATA-Service and until now I didn't find a way to create a story with a ODATA-Service.

What I already managed is to integrate the Fiori App (Line Item Report) via Web Page into the story - but here the look and feel is different as well as the parameters aren't taken over?

So it would be great if someone has an idea how to set-up a line item report in the SAC environment as story.

Have a nice day,
Patrick

entry.title: Re: Adding Attachments to Emails in SAP CPI Using Groovy
entry.content:
This needs an update. Camel updates require change of default attachment.

3284639 - Changes to Groovy Scripts: Upgrading to the Attachment Wrapper - SAP for Me

entry.title: Re: Output Material Documents in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content: Dear Giorgia, In case the cloud printer has been setup, the output will be printed auto. Would you please find more details from the scope item 1LQ below? https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/SolS/EARL_SolS-013/2408/SolP/1LQ

entry.title: Re: Supplier Batch CDS Views for S/4 Hana Public Cloud
entry.content: Hi @mbha, This field is not releaded in these cds view now. Would you please consider to create a custom field and also enable it the related CDS view to show it.

entry.title: Re: RAP Business Events with Advanced Event Mesh [3]: Creating events with deep payloads
entry.content:
@TimoMaier 

Thank you for providing the sample code!

Although the event was not triggered from the test class, it was successfully triggered from an exit code, which was what I wanted to do.

entry.title: Re: CDS based data extraction - Part I Overview
entry.content:
Hi,

Thanks for this detailed blog. I am getting warning message :Data extraction for CDS Entity XXXXX not possible [Analytics]. Is there is any prerequisite to enable this option. 

Any pointers will be greatly appreciated. 

Regards,

Deepti

entry.title: Re: New Recruiting Offer Letter Template Rules - 1H 2024
entry.content:
Hi Community,

Praveen - Thank you so much for sharing this, I somehow missed this enhancement altogether, and stumbling on your post has solved a challenge we were facing.

Just sharing below in case it helps someone else.

I agree that not being able to edit the values populated by the tokens is a big challenge, and initially I thought the IF / ELSE would be a real challenge too, but after watching the video on Learning Hub (https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/configure-sap-successfactors-recruiting-recruiter-experience/creating-offer-letter-templates) it seems their recommended approach is to set the rule to always true and then use lookup tables to derive the right values.

For example, say if you need different values for Country = USA vs Country = Not USA, you would create an object to store the text for USA and Not USA, then add the dynamic token to the letter, then in your business rule (set to always true) you would use the lookup functionality to control which text is selected.

The same logic could be built for any variables, e.g., Pay Scale Level, Location, etc.

The video does a much better job of explaining than I am, but after watching Learning Hub video I can see how to make this work.

entry.title: Re: CDS view with Change Data Capture(CDC) for Replication Flow – Part 1
entry.content: @Balu483 : From a replication flow perspective, if there's a mismatch in the delta entries, you would need to stop and restart the Replication Flow run which will load full data in the target once more.

entry.title: How to extract vendor intermediary banks entered the first time via FIBPU
entry.content:
Hello experts, need your help please!

Did someone know how to extract vendor intermediary bank accounts from tables or even Tcodes or Fiori apps in standard solution ?

I'm can't find where the assignment is set between vendor bank account and intermediary bank..

Thank you for your help!

Regards,

entry.title: Showed "Couldn't load file" in Payable Analytics"
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are trying to generate the payable analytic reports in Test system and some tiles could not be loaded.

Please kindly check my attached image and let me know how I can fix this.

Really appreciated for your kindly response.

Loading chart data failed.Database returned the SQL code 719. Error text: currency/unit conversion error: Conversion( "INPUT_COL0", "INPUT_COL1", "INPUT_COL2" ), row 0: ... ot determine valid conversion rate for value(s) 0, -21.8, 3030.2 from unit 'SGD' to unit 'EUR' on date 2024-11-26 00:00:00.0000000 for client '100' Error reading the data of InfoProvider 2CIAPOVRD Error while reading data; navigation is possible Database returned the SQL code 719. Error text: currency/unit conversion error: Conversion( "INPUT_COL0" ), row 0: could not determine valid ... n rate for value(s) -21.8 from unit 'SGD' to unit 'EUR' on date 2024-11-26 00:00:00.0000000 for client '100' Error reading the data of InfoProvider 2CIAPOVRD Error while reading data; navigation is possible.

Best Regards,

Phoo

entry.title: Re: Supplier Batch CDS Views for S/4 Hana Public Cloud
entry.content: Yes, that what i had done, create custom field and integrate it with the Forms, thanks Eric

entry.title: Re: Consulta a tabla OITM y UFD1
entry.content:
Hola @asoris ,

You can try the below query.

SELECT
T0."ItemCode",
T0."ItemName" AS "ItemName",
(SELECT X1."Descr" FROM CUFD X0 INNER JOIN UFD1 X1 ON X0."TableID"=X1."TableID" AND X0."FieldID"=X1."FieldID" 
WHERE X0."TableID"='OITM' AND X0."AliasID"='UDF_NAME' AND X1."FldValue" = T0."U_UDF_NAME" ) as "UDF_Description", 
FROM OITM T0

So, let's say the UDF name is LineID, you can replace UDF_NAME as LineID and U_UDF_NAME as U_LineID in the above query.

Saludos.

Manish.

entry.title: Budget Controlling Not working in Recurring Journal Entries
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I would like to control budget for my expenses in "Manage Recurring Journal Entries" app. Even though I uploaded file with Cost center budgeting, I could only control budget using "Manage General Journal Entries" app and "Verify General Journal Entries" App. When I go with recurring journal entries, all unposted entries can be posted and no error or warning messages occured and can be posted.

Please kindly give a guidance if it has any possible solution to control budget for recurring journal entries.

Thanks for your kindly advice.

Best Regards,

Phoo

entry.title: Re: Recommendation-Assisted Sales Order Creation - Overview

entry.title: How to save a user-specific layout in the app Bill of Exchange List?
entry.content:
How to save a user-specific layout in the app Bill of Exchange List?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to save a user-specific layout in the app Bill of...
entry.content:
1. Open the app Bill of Exchange List.
  2. Fill out the parameters and click Run.
  3. Choose Menu-Settings-Layout-Current and customize the layout.
  4. Then click Save as.
  5. Fill out the Layout and Name and choose User-Specific and apply.

Kindly refer to the following KBA for more reference.

3545046 - How to save a user-specific layout in the app "Bill of Exchange List"? - SAP for Me

entry.title: Is the company currently eligible to use SAP CALM free of charge?
entry.content:
Dear SAP

 

 

 

Could you please confirm whether SAP CALM is included free of charge under the company current contract?

 

 If it is available, could you also clarify the duration for which it can be used?

 

 

 

If possible, could you kindly provide a guide to facilitate the easier setup of SAP CALM?

 

Additionally, we would greatly appreciate it if you could share any comprehensive documents or guides covering SAP CALM from A to Z.

 

 

 

Best Regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Is the company currently eligible to use SAP CALM fre...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

SAP Cloud ALM is part of SAP Enterprise Support. The usage rights are included in the SAP Cloud Service subscription and in SAP Enterprise Support. You can learn more about the usage rights of SAP Cloud ALM here.

The scope encompassed to SAP Enterprise Support is also valid for Product Support for Large Enterprises and our premium engagements SAP ActiveAttention, and SAP MaxAttention. 

 

For further documents regarding Cloud ALM,  the links below will take you to various resource.

Setup and Administration for SAP Cloud ALM

SAP Help

SAP Support Potal

Expert portal for Operations

Expert portal for Implementation

Learning Journey Operations

Learning Journey Implementation

Product Road Map

What’s New

 

Best Regards,

Sunny

entry.title: Re: Automatic Hire
entry.content:
Hi @Crystal,

We’ve enabled the automatic hire functionality in Onboarding, but candidates are consistently getting stuck in Manage Pending Hires. Upon review, all the required data appears to be in place, and there are no issues when I manually submit the data.

Has anyone else encountered similar issues, or is this functionality working as expected on your end?

Thanks,

Namratha

entry.title: Re: Absence Counting Rules 2.0 in Time Management - 2H 2023
entry.content:
Hello!

I have a question around the counting rule needing to take into account whether the next day is a public holiday, for shifts going over midnight.

Client needs to be able to apply for leave on the day before the public holiday, but the deduction should only be for the hours this side of midnight (so 0 hours on the day of the public holiday). Same goes for the counting rule on the day of the public holiday - the counting rule should only count the hours after midnight. 

Is there any plan to be able to check the holiday settings for the next day in the absence counting rules? 

Thanks

Shalene

entry.title: SAP S4 HANA PUBLIC CLOUD EDITION - Email Notification for Approval Workflow
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I've configured the below steps to achieve email notification for Credit Memo Process Approval Workflow, but still I'm not able to receive a email notification for the same. Please advice if I'm missing anything in here.

1. Created workflow rules for Credit Memo and also did Manage Teams and Responsibilities

2. Created a custom template using Maintain Email Template (Approval Request for Credit Memo Request SD_SLS_CMR_APPROVAL_EMAIL_TMPL)

3. Configured Sender Email Address

4. Changed the settings in Output Parameter Determination.

Still I'm not receiving an email after the creation of Credit Memo. 

Please advice.

Thanks,

SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sales

entry.title: Unable to add fields in CT04
entry.content: While creating the class characteristics in CT04, in the additional data tab we have selected the Z table that we have created for the field "Table Name". But when we try to add the field name system gives the error message "No objects matched the selection criteria". Can anyone help on how we can add the fields from the Z table.

entry.title: Remove Review content button from Learning History for old revisions
entry.content:
In SF Learning, is there a way we can restrict the visibility or automatically remove the Review Content button from Learning History when an item is revised and no longer available? 

What we are finding is that people are clicking on the button and getting an error message because the content is no longer available to them because it has been superseded.

The password has no special characters

Login internal VM SAP HANA - login success.

Login outsite VM (Windows Host) - Invalid credential

Setup 

Log authenticate

Rgs

Fabio

entry.title: ABAP Development in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are considering building an S/4HANA for our own learning purposes.
The purpose is to use it to learn and verify each function of S/4HANA and its extensions.

We are considering which of the three environments to choose: ① S/4HANA (on-premise), ② S/4HANA Cloud Public edition, or ③ S/4HANA Cloud Private edition.

So, I would like to ask the following questions.
If I purchase the S/4HANA Cloud Public edition, is it possible to do side-by-side development using ABAP?

Also, is it possible to learn and verify development methods with the S/4HANA Cloud Public edition, which is a non-commercial license available to SAP partners?

Best regards,
Yuito

entry.title: Re: How to check change logs for SSCUI(Configuration Acti...
entry.content: Please check KBA 2899423 - How to check the change logs for an SSCUI?

entry.title: Re: Adapters in Pi
entry.content: The explanation of PI Adapters was very insightful. I would be grateful if you could also explain what CPI Adapters are and how they work

entry.title: Re: User change logs in Identity Authentication Service
entry.content:
It is possible to Access the audit logs for changes in the personal data, successful, and failed authentications for Identity Authentication tenants on both the SAP, and the AWS and Azure infrastructures in the Audit Log Service in SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry.

  1. To view the audit logs for Identity Authentication tenants in the SAP infrastructures, generate a Client ID and Client Secret for audit logs in the Administration Console for Identity Authentication first. After that, obtain an access token, and then call the audit log retrieval API to access the data.
  2. To access the audit logs, follow the procedures described here, under the section "Access Audit Logs". The following KBA shows how to use Postman to retrieve the logs: 2913940 - How to use Postman to get IAS audit log
  3. For Identity Authentication tenants in the AWS and Azure infrastructures follow this instruction: Access Audit Logs (AWS, Azure Infrastructure).

To verify the infrastructure of your Identity Authentication tenant, cross-check Regional Availability with the region of your tenant on https://iamtenants.accounts.cloud.sap/.

SAP Note Reference : https://me.sap.com/notes/0002753412

entry.title: Re: Blank page when logging in SAC inside Excel Desktop
entry.content:
Hi Ganjos,

Please go through below document and check your configurations are correct.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD_OFFICE/4554bec9b964401db071a89f779e8319/d46a3d456d8447259f35b7dddc8ebbb9.html?locale=en-US

 

Best Regards,

Basavaraj

entry.title: Re: Welcome
entry.content:
Thank you so much for this important course. I started my SAP AI Journey starting from this course. Everyone should know Ethics and Principles of our product. Thank you again.

Regards,

Sudhakar Gadila

entry.title: Unable to Use {*} and {**} Operators in APIRule v2alpha1 Paths
entry.content:
I am currently working with Kyma and trying to use the APIRule v2alpha1 Custom Resource to define paths that include {*} and {**} operators as mentioned in the documentation .

example: path: /api/{*}/details/{**}

However, when I try to apply this configuration, I get the following error:

The APIRule "multiple-services-jwt" is invalid: spec.rules[1].path: Invalid value: "/api/{*}/details/{**}": spec.rules[1].path in body should match '^(\/\*|\/[0-9a-zA-Z/()?!\\_-]+)$'

 

This error suggests that the {*} and {**} operators are not allowed, even though the official documentation specifies that these operators can be used to match paths with dynamic segments.

Thank you in advance for your help!

Best regards,
Abhinav

entry.title: Re: Severe error(s) occurred in phase PREP_IMPORT/UPDATE_...
entry.content: Hi Michael, Could you share the full error log, and check the overall disk space in SAP USR folder and DB log

entry.title: Re: Active/Active Read enabled option
entry.content: Dear Customer, To acquire an additional license, I recommend contacting our SAP sales directly. Based on my understanding, this particular license does not come with a standard key like the typical HANA licenses. Regarding the error you encountered, I guess it is due to a different issue. To assist you more effectively, could you please provide further details about the error? This will enable us to conduct a thorough analysis and address your concern accurately. Best regards, Charles

entry.title: Importing Master Data for Flex Master Data into SAP Ariba Strategic Sourcing
entry.content:
Dear Colleagues,

We are looking for a way to import master data for FMD into SAP Ariba Strategic Sourcing Suite.

We already understood that we can import master data from SAP ERP to SAP Ariba Procurement via Import Batch Task, but we are struggling with sending master data from SAP ERP to SAP Ariba Sourcing via ARBCIG_MASTER_DATA_EXPORT program.

As you know, when you select Sourcing and Contracts in the ARBCIG_MASTER_DATA_EXPORT program to send master data to Ariba, the Import External System Master Data Task is executed instead of the Import Batch Task.

We want to send master data for FMD from ERP to Ariba through the Import External System Master Data Task.

If there are any colleagues who have this experience, please give me your generous advice.

entry.title: IN SAP PI/PO there is soap adapter scenario (WSDL)
entry.content: There is scenario of soap adapters and in the receiver side the target wants WSDL file how to do it?

entry.title: Re: MRP Live MD01N is creating planned orders with duplic...
entry.content: hi Pasath,

entry.title: Re: MRP Live MD01N is creating planned orders with duplic...
entry.content: hi Pasath, Thanks for your kind response.

entry.title: Re: MRP Live MD01N is creating planned orders with duplic...
entry.content: hi Pasath, Thanks for your kind response. Let me explain how we resolved the issue. The materials were being duplicated after MRP run and some of the planned orders were showing exactly double materials. We have activated the ECM and i think there was issue in validity dates. So we applied the changes mentioned in the SAP Note: 2611243. Hence the results were satisfactory after running the MRP. Thank you

entry.title: Re: Best Practices for SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation
entry.content:
Many thanks for sharing @henrik_zimmermann.

I particularly like the ALM Best Practice Processflows in Cloud ALM. This allows us to adapt them directly to our IT processes if necessary and thus also demonstrate the possibilities and advantages of BPMN capabilities in Cloud ALM!

entry.title: Assembly Order Process - One service material but multiple standard WBS templates
entry.content:
Hello All,

As per my business requirement, we have implemented an assembly order process here we have one service material but 12 Std WBS templates. The issue is in CN08 If I assign one service material and one order type to multiple std wbs how system will determine the differentiation of projects 

I suggest for each standard template, there should be a separate order type, requirement class, and requirement type to avoid confusion but sales team is not agreeing to create multiple requirement class and requirement type, 

Do we have standard configuration or do we need to go for custom development 

Thanks 

Kumar

entry.title: Re: Severe error(s) occurred in phase PREP_IMPORT/UPDATE_...
entry.content:
Hi Sriram, 

Here are the logs I found:

ORAUPDATE:

EXECUTING F:\usr\sap\prd\sum\abap\exe\brconnect.EXE -u -p F:\usr\sap\prd\sum\abap\tmp\OPTSTAT.LST -c -f stats -f allsel,collect -p 6 -RDB
BR0801I BRCONNECT 7.40 (49)
BR0280I BRCONNECT time stamp: 2024-11-26 06:28:19
BR0262I Enter database user name[/password]:
BR0805I Start of BRCONNECT processing: cfpvnkbj.sta 2024-11-26 06:28:19
BR0484I BRCONNECT log file: F:\usr\sap\prd\sum\abap\tmp\cfpvnkbj.sta
BR0280I BRCONNECT time stamp: 2024-11-26 06:28:23
BR0301W SQL error -1024 at location brc_dblog_open-5, SQL statement:
'INSERT INTO SAP_DBATL (SYS_ID, OPER_ID, TASKNAME, JOB_NR, UPD_OP, TLOGNAME, STATUS, BEGIN_OP, END_OP, RC, INTERNAL) VALUES ('PRD', '20241126062819', 'Update optimizer statistics', '0000000000', '20241126062823', 'F:\usr\sap\prd\sum\abap\tmp\cfpvnkbj.sta', 'STARTED', '20241126062819', ' ', '0000', ' ')'
ORA-01024: invalid datatype in OCI call
BR0324W Insertion of database log header failed

BR0280I BRCONNECT time stamp: 2024-11-26 06:28:24
BR0813I Schema owners found in database PRD: SAPSR3*, SAPSR4DB
BR0280I BRCONNECT time stamp: 2024-11-26 06:28:24
BR0301E SQL error -1024 at location BrIndListGet-1, SQL statement:
'OPEN curs_78 CURSOR FOR'
'SELECT OWNER, INDEX_NAME, INDEX_TYPE, TABLE_OWNER, TABLE_NAME, NVL(TABLESPACE_NAME, ' '), NVL(PARTITIONED, ' '), NVL(UNIQUENESS, ' '), NVL(COMPRESSION, ' '), NVL(PREFIX_LENGTH, 0), NVL(GENERATED, ' '), NVL(JOIN_INDEX, ' '), NVL(STATUS, ' '), NVL(LOGGING, ' '), NVL(NUM_ROWS, -1), NVL(BLEVEL, -1), NVL(LEAF_BLOCKS, -1), NVL(DISTINCT_KEYS, -1), NVL(AVG_LEAF_BLOCKS_PER_KEY, -1), NVL(AVG_DATA_BLOCKS_PER_KEY, -1), NVL(CLUSTERING_FACTOR, -1), NVL(SAMPLE_SIZE, -1), NVL(TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(LAST_ANALYZED, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')), 0), NVL(INITIAL_EXTENT, -1), NVL(NEXT_EXTENT, -1), NVL(MAX_EXTENTS, -1), NVL(DEGREE, '-1'), NVL(PCT_FREE, -1), NVL(INI_TRANS, -1), NVL(MAX_TRANS, -1), NVL(GLOBAL_STATS, ' '), NVL(TEMPORARY, ' ') FROM DBA_INDEXES WHERE OWNER = 'SAPSR3' AND INDEX_TYPE <> 'CLUSTER' AND INDEX_TYPE <> 'LOB' AND TABLE_OWNER = 'SAPSR3' AND TABLE_NAME = 'TODIR' AND TEMPORARY <> 'Y' ORDER BY OWNER, TABLE_NAME, INDEX_NAME'
ORA-01024: invalid datatype in OCI call

BR0806I End of BRCONNECT processing: cfpvnkbj.sta 2024-11-26 06:28:24
BR0280I BRCONNECT time stamp: 2024-11-26 06:28:24
BR0804I BRCONNECT terminated with errors
SAPup> Process with PID 5576 terminated with status 3 at 20241126062824!

DBCONNCHK:

4 ETW000 F:\usr\sap\prd\sum\abap\exe\R3trans.EXE version 6.26 (release 754 - 01.08.24 - 14:07:06).
4 ETW000 unicode enabled version
4 ETW000 ===============================================
4 ETW000
4 ETW000 date&time : 25.11.2024 - 08:58:08
4 ETW000 control file: <no ctrlfile>
4 ETW000 R3trans was called as follows: F:\usr\sap\prd\sum\abap\exe\R3trans.EXE -x -w F:\usr\sap\prd\sum\abap\log\DBCONNCHKEXE.LOG
4 ETW000 trace at level 1 opened for a given file pointer
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] Mon Nov 25 08:58:08 2024
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] Loading DB library 'dboraslib.dll' ...
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] Library 'dboraslib.dll' loaded
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] Version of 'dboraslib.dll' is "754.00", patchlevel (0.400)
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] read_con_info_ssfs(): DBSL supports extended connect protocol
4 ETW000 ==> connect info for default DB will be read from ssfs
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] array_buf_size not initialized. Setting standard size.
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] array_buf_size = 130000
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] Statement Cache (size=250) created
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] Oracle client version: 12.1.0.2.0, (dbsl 754 200323, UNICODE[2], LE)
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] Detailed Oracle client (patch) info not available.
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] New environment handle env=2447718B670 for nls=0, con=0 created
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] Client NLS setting (by OCINlsGetInfo(con=0)): 'AMERICAN_AMERICA.UTF16'
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] local client OS environment: NLS_LANG = 'AMERICAN_AMERICA.UTF8'
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] NLS_NCHAR not set
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] Connecting as SAPSR3/<pwd>@PRD on connection 0 (nls 0) ... (dbsl 754 200323, UNICODE[2], LE)
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] OCIHandleAlloc(con=0, env=2447718B670): New service svc=24477151908 created, rc=0
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] OCIServerAttach(con=0, svc=24477151908): New server hdl. srv=24477196B00 attached to 'PRD'
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] OCISessionBegin(con=0, svc=24477151908, srv=24477196B00='PRD'): start session usr=244771AA430='SAPSR3', rc=0
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] Now 'SAPSR3/<pwd>@PRD' is connected: con=0, nls=0, session=100, time='2024-11-25 08:58:08'
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] DB instance PRD is running on SAPPRDX with ORACLE version 12.1.0.2.0 since NOV 24, 2024, 13:37:27.
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] con=0, V$NLS_PARAMETERS: NLS_LANG=AMERICAN_AMERICA.UTF8, NLS_NCHAR=UTF8
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] con CharacterSet (DB) NCharSet svchp srvhp usrhp nls TNS
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] 0 UTF8 UTF8 24477151908 24477196B00 244771AA430 0 PRD

4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] 0 UTF16 AL16UTF16 2447718B670 24477149490 2447713D420 2447714FAF0

4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] -->DbSlControl(con=0,cmd=43=DBSL_CMD_SAPRELEASE_SET) -> basis rel.='700'=700)
4 ETW000 Connected to database.
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] Disconnecting from ALL connections:
4 ETW000 [ dev trc,00000] Disconnecting con=0

entry.title: Re: How to delete customers in SAP S/4HANA Cloud?

entry.title: My Inbox - Release of Completed Invoice
entry.content: Hi everyone, I hope you're doing well. I have a question: Is it possible to display supplier invoices in my inbox for the 'Release of Completed Invoice' step without needing to click the 'Open Task' button? I’d appreciate your input. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: How can we consume northwind and S4HANA on premise services in single UI5 App in SAP BAS ?
entry.content: hi @hristotsolev I am trying to create new application consuming 2 different destination. Also i tried in existing application also.

entry.title: "field country region must contain a value error "in SEPA mass mandate creation,T Code-FPSEPA
entry.content:
HI Team,

Currently facing one issue when i try to create mass sepa mandates in parallel

"field country region must contain a value error in SEPA mass mandate creation"

Do we need to maintain some configurations at SPRO node?

entry.title: Re: Email Verification Requirement for Member Login in SA...
entry.content:
Hi @Rvanjari,

Good day.

To enable Email Verification Flow:

  1. Go to Identity -> Security -> Identity Verification and select either "Use Code Verification" or "Customize Redirection URL" under Email Verification. Please note that both options cannot be selected simultaneously.

  2. Once this setting is configured in the console, the following server-side API calls must be made during login if the user's email is unverified, as per your requirements:

    • accounts.otp.sendCode REST
    • accounts.otp.update REST

Please note that the user will not be able to log in until this verification is successfully completed. I am not sure what you mean by "Later, an update account request will verify the email".

I hope this clarifies the process.

For more details please refer:

  1.  email update
  2. email code verification

Best Regards,
Preethi G
SAP CDC Consultant

entry.title: Re: How-to-guide for SAP GUI Scripting
entry.content:
Hi Sahoo,

Thanks for this post. It is beneficial. Similarly, do we have any script that can be used for Mac OS? I suppose this script supports only on windows machines. Thank you.

Regards,

Surya

entry.title: Re: Dispatcher Reminder (BusinessProcessSteps) in Query and Business rules
entry.content: The idea was that we would use the Dismatcher Reminder so that a user could trigger a business rule in certain situations. We have now used a UDF for this case.

entry.title: Re: Scripting documentation for IronPython for CPQ Quote...
entry.content:
Hi,

Please refer to the following SAP Help Portal documentation related to your query:

  • Quote objects in IronPython for Quote 2.0
  • Full list of CTX tags for Quote 2.0

Best regards,
Fancy

entry.title: Re: PRD: Unable to convert UTC timezone to specific Timezone
entry.content: Hi Julie,

entry.title: Re: PRD: Unable to convert UTC timezone to specific Timezone
entry.content: Hi Julie, I faced the same issue and I could resolve it by selecting event handler class 'com.plateau.common.reportservice.impl.PlateauDataItemEventHandler' and setting the FormatType as DateTime and Selecting Format DateTime as AEDT. You can find these parameters in Advance properties. Hope this helps.

entry.title: Re: Logs Deletion (Integration Framework) - SAP B1
entry.content:
Hi ahmad_alsaharty

You could enable "daily deletion" from integration framework → Maintenance → Cfg MsgLog.

In backup buffer days, you can define number of days , logs will be stored. Example: If value is 5 then logs will be deleted at 6th day.

Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh
SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Future Dated Hires Provisioning from SF EC/Onboarding to Azure AD / Onprem AD
entry.content:
Hi @JPRAKASH ,

No, future dated hires are directly coming from EC.

Username is also mapped to samAccountName in AD. Could there be any other reason due to which future dated hires are not replicated?

entry.title: Re: Crystal reports 2020 : Auto resize ?
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you for your answer.

I understand, but it's surprising.
It's not the most common need in report development.

Best.

entry.title: Re: Author Spotlight: Tim Koster - November 2024 Edition
entry.content:
Hi Tim & Svea , 

Inspiring testimonial . Congratulations . 

Regards ,

entry.title: Re: Issue with SortByValue in SAC Table – Missing Data fo...
entry.content: Seems like to me, please log ticket if haven't done so yet.

entry.title: Re: How did I get into SAP in Thessaloniki
entry.content:
My SAP story began during a challenging time. I was working as an ERP consultant in Greece, fully committed to my role. However, circumstances took an unexpected turn when I was let go on 30/12 during the COVID period due to a decision influenced by office politics. 💼❌

At first, it felt like a setback, but as things turned out, that layoff was actually a gift. 🎁 It pushed me to invest in myself and focus on growth, leading me to the fascinating world of SAP. 🚀✨ What started as a challenge turned into an opportunity, and now I’ve found not just a career but a true passion. 💙 I’m grateful for where this journey has taken me so far. 🌟

entry.title: Re: Welcome
entry.content:
Happy to hear that and thank you for your nice feedback.

kind regards,
Britta

entry.title: Re: Future Dated Hires Provisioning from SF EC/Onboarding to Azure AD / Onprem AD
entry.content:
H @vslavova1 

Can you please check below ?

 

1. Is there any error messages in Azure AD ? usually it shows like Unauthorized IP, Quarraintained etc., 

2. Login SF EC wtih SF API user and try to view the profile of the employee that you want to sync with Azure AD. 

3. Check Employment Info field mapped as below

https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/entra/identity/app-provisioning/sap-successfactors-integration-reference#how-pre-hire-processing-works

entry.title: Re: Create New Controlling Area in S4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content: It is possible to create new Controlling Area in S4 HANA Public Cloud or not Please input your suggestion.

entry.title: Re: Does somebody know if the number labels color can be...
entry.content: Yes, you can assign color to data label in widget styling panel.

entry.title: Outlook based PR approval in ECC - PR not going for next approver
entry.content:
Hello team,

We have implemented Purchase requisition approval workflow from outlook based.

We created class for that  & maintain this class in SCOT setting. Overall workflow working fine in UAT server.

But sometimes in some PR workflow stuck & mail not going for next approver IN SOST t code.

I am sure this not issue regarding mail id, approval authorization. Please help & suggest on this.

entry.title: Re: How to Restrict an Employee from Overbooking the time in S4HANA Cloud for Professional Services
entry.content:
@mbesli Hi Mehmet,

The customer excepted the monthly breakdown. So we did not further investigate. 

Best regards
Anja

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Fiori "Manage Stock" App Issue
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I tried to manage the product stock quantity using the "Manage Stock" app in SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA Demo Version, but it's not working.

Is there anyone who can help resolve this issue?

1. Stock-Single Material (Material=TG11)

 

2. Click "Manage Stock"

 

3. Nothing came up

entry.title: SAP DMC Order Releasing Issue - Material Base Unit of Measure EA
entry.content:
Hello Experts,
 
Can I please request your help on this small issue?
 
For demo purpose we have created some materials and orders manually in SAP DMC with below configurations.
 
e.g. Material - MAT_01
 
Name - MAT_01
Version- A1
Description - MAT_01
Material type - Manufactured
Lot Size - 1
Base Unit of Measure - EA
 
Other settings are kept default.
 
Material creation was successful without error using Manage Material App.
 
Later order was created by keeping minimal configuration as below.
 
e.g. Order- ORDER006
Material - MAT_01/A1
 
Order creation was successful without error using Manage Orders App.
 
Now we are facing issue while releasing the order. Below is error screenshot we are receiving at DMC end.
 

 

Could you please shade some light on the issue?
 
Regard's
Uday

entry.title: Re: PR release from outlook
entry.content: Hi we have implemented same configuration but sometime PR got stuck & mail not triggered for next level approver can any one guide on this

entry.title: Re: Validation to block cancellation of AR invoice for sp...
entry.content:
Hi @Swathy ,

If ( :object_type = '13' AND :transaction_type = 'A')  
THEN 
			DECLARE temp_var_0 INT := 0; 
			SELECT COUNT(B."DocEntry") INTO temp_var_0
			FROM OINV B 
			LEFT OUTER JOIN OUSR C ON B."UserSign" = C."USERID"
			WHERE B.CANCELED IN ('C','Y') AND  C."U_NAME" NOT IN ('cwi01','cwi03','cwi04') AND B."DocEntry" =:list_of_cols_val_tab_del;
 
			IF :temp_var_0>0 
			THEN 
						error:=503;
						error_message:='Cancellation is not allowed';
			END IF;
END IF;

When you try to cancel the AR Invoice document, a cancellation document is added therefor the transaction type will be [A]dd.

For Cancellation you can check the CANCELED column.

 

Thanks.

Manish.

entry.title: SF Recruiting Job Requisition Details Print Preview
entry.content:
Good Morning,

Instead of the print preview, the following error message is displayed:

The document you are trying to access is no longer in this folder.It may have been already acted upon, moved to another folder, or deleted, or the link you are trying to follow may be invalid.Click here to return to your homepage.

Does anyone have any idea what the problem could be?

Thanks in advance for every hint.

entry.title: MAKE EXCEL, PDF file with OLE!!
entry.content:
Hello, I've just been learning abap for 3 months.

I recently created a simple program by creating a virtual order history management table.
In the process, I made a code to convert the selected row into an Excel file and make it into a pdf file. However, there was a strange phenomenon that the code that worked at home(Window10) did not work properly in the school lab(Window11), and it worked in the computer(Window11) next to me, and it did not work with my MacBook(MacOS). Please I would appreciate it if you could look at the code once and find out the problem.

 

 

"PDF 출력.
FORM EXPORT_PDF USING P_INDEX.

  INCLUDE OLE2INCL. " OLE 관련 선언 포함.

  " 데이터 형식 선언.
  TYPES: T_C(1500) TYPE C,                     " 1500 길이의 문자열 타입.
         T_DATA TYPE TABLE OF T_C.             " T_C로 구성된 내부 테이블.

  " 데이터 선언.
  DATA: LV_TEMP TYPE STRING,                   " 선택된 파일 경로.
        LV_SOURCE TYPE RLGRAP-FILENAME,        " 원본 파일 경로.
        LV_DEST TYPE RLGRAP-FILENAME,          " 저장될 PDF 파일 경로.
        LV_APPLICATION TYPE OLE2_OBJECT,       " Excel 애플리케이션 객체.
        LV_WORKBOOK TYPE OLE2_OBJECT,          " Workbook 객체.
        LT_EXCEL TYPE T_DATA,                  " Excel 데이터를 저장할 내부 테이블.
        LS_EXCEL TYPE LINE OF T_DATA,          " 내부 테이블의 단일 행.
        LS_WWWDATATAB LIKE WWWDATATAB,
        DELI TYPE C.                           " 데이터 구분자.

  " 파일 경로 설정.
  CALL METHOD CL_GUI_FRONTEND_SERVICES=>DIRECTORY_BROWSE
    EXPORTING
      WINDOW_TITLE         =  '저장할 위치 선택'
    CHANGING
      SELECTED_FOLDER = LV_TEMP
    EXCEPTIONS
      CNTL_ERROR               = 1
      ERROR_NO_GUI             = 2
      NOT_SUPPORTED_BY_GUI     = 3
      OTHERS                   = 4.

  CONCATENATE LV_TEMP '\과제3.xlsx' INTO LV_SOURCE.
  CONCATENATE LV_TEMP '\과제3.pdf' INTO LV_DEST.

*  LV_SOURCE = 'C:\Users\User\Desktop\과제3.xls'.
*  LV_DEST = 'C:\Users\User\Desktop\과제3.pdf'.

  " ALV에서 선택된 데이터를 읽어오기.
  READ TABLE GT_ORDNO_ALV INTO GS_ORDNO_ALV INDEX P_INDEX.

  SELECT SINGLE *
    FROM WWWDATA
    INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF LS_WWWDATATAB
   WHERE OBJID = 'Z_EXCEL_TEMPLATE01'.

  CALL FUNCTION 'DOWNLOAD_WEB_OBJECT'
    EXPORTING
      KEY               = LS_WWWDATATAB
      DESTINATION        =  LV_SOURCE.

  " Excel 애플리케이션 객체 생성.
  CREATE OBJECT LV_APPLICATION 'EXCEL.APPLICATION'.

  " Excel 워크북 열기.
  CALL METHOD OF LV_APPLICATION 'WORKBOOKS' = LV_WORKBOOK.

  CALL METHOD OF LV_WORKBOOK 'OPEN'
    EXPORTING #1 = LV_SOURCE.

  " 활성 워크시트 가져오기.
  GET PROPERTY OF LV_APPLICATION 'ACTIVESHEET' = LV_WORKBOOK.

  " 워크시트 이름 설정.
  SET PROPERTY OF LV_WORKBOOK 'Name' = '주문내역'.

  " 데이터 구분자 (탭 문자) 설정.
  DELI = CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>HORIZONTAL_TAB.

  " Excel 데이터의 첫 행: 헤더 정의.
  LS_EXCEL = |주문번호{ DELI }회원ID{ DELI }제품번호{ DELI }제품명{ DELI }매출금액{ DELI }판매일자|.
  APPEND LS_EXCEL TO LT_EXCEL.
  CLEAR: LS_EXCEL.

  " ALV 데이터 행을 Excel에 추가.
  LS_EXCEL = |{ GS_ORDNO_ALV-ZORDNO } { DELI } { GS_ORDNO_ALV-ZIDCODE } {
  DELI } { GS_ORDNO_ALV-ZMATNR } { DELI } { GS_ORDNO_ALV-ZMATNAME } {
  DELI } { GS_ORDNO_ALV-ZSLAMT } { DELI } { GS_ORDNO_ALV-ZJDATE } |.
  APPEND LS_EXCEL TO LT_EXCEL.
  CLEAR LS_EXCEL.

  " 클립보드로 데이터 내보내기.
  DATA: LV_RC TYPE I.
  CALL METHOD CL_GUI_FRONTEND_SERVICES=>CLIPBOARD_EXPORT
    EXPORTING
      NO_AUTH_CHECK = ''
    IMPORTING
      DATA = LT_EXCEL
    CHANGING
      RC = LV_RC
    EXCEPTIONS
      CNTL_ERROR           = 1                " 컨트롤 에러.
      ERROR_NO_GUI         = 2                " GUI가 없음.
      NOT_SUPPORTED_BY_GUI = 3                " GUI가 해당 기능을 지원하지 않음.
      NO_AUTHORITY         = 4                " 권한 부족.
      OTHERS               = 5.


  " 클립보드의 데이터를 워크시트에 붙여넣기.
  CALL METHOD OF LV_WORKBOOK 'PASTE'.

  CALL METHOD OF LV_APPLICATION 'ActiveWorkbook' = LV_WORKBOOK.
  CALL METHOD OF LV_WORKBOOK 'Save'.

*  " Excel 파일로 저장.
*  CALL METHOD OF LV_WORKBOOK 'SaveAs'
*    EXPORTING
*      #1 = LV_SOURCE
*      #2 = 1.                 " 파일 형식 코드: Excel 파일.


  " PDF 형식으로 내보내기.
  CALL METHOD OF LV_WORKBOOK 'ExportAsfixedFormat'
    EXPORTING #1 = 0                  " 파일 형식: PDF.
              #2 = LV_DEST            " 저장 경로.
              #3 = 0.

  " 워크북 및 Excel 애플리케이션 종료.
  CALL METHOD OF LV_WORKBOOK 'Close'.
  CALL METHOD OF LV_APPLICATION 'Quit'.

ENDFORM.

I'm Korean so I'm sorry that the annotation is in Korean,

entry.title: Re: input control not showing data until switching pages
entry.content: Please report a ticket on this.

entry.title: Re: Would Like to Configure Rounding Values for Sales Order?
entry.content: Hello,

entry.title: Re: Validation to block cancellation of AR invoice for sp...
entry.content: Hi, Thanks for your time and response. We have handled this process through General authorisation - Cancel Marketing Documents by Generating Cancelation Documents option. We set this option to No authorization.

entry.title: Re: How to connect to SAP B1 service layer using react na...
entry.content: The issue was with the certificate. We added a valid certificate and the issue is solved.

entry.title: Re: Onboarding 2.0 Furnish Equipment integration to External Application
entry.content: Can we have third party integration from SAP New Recruit Task Equipment request to FreshService? and receive status completed in SAP ONB once the ticket is completed in Freshservice??

entry.title: Re: SAP S4 HANA PUBLIC CLOUD EDITION - Email Notification...
entry.content:
Dear Brinda1,

Please ensure the you have DKIM enabled as per 1LQ set up guide. Also check you have done and maintained setting for sender Domain.Sending emails requires defining allowed email domains, as well as sender and recipient email addresses

Please see 1LQ set up.

https://support.sap.com/content/dam/SAAP/Sol_Pack/S4C/Library/Setup/1LQ_Set-Up_EN_XX.pdf

Regards

Sahil Grover

entry.title: Re: Onboarding 2.0 Furnish Equipment integration to External Application
entry.content:
Hi Sharath,

Can we have third party integration from SAP New Recruit Task Equipment request to FreshService? and receive status completed in SAP ONB once the ticket is completed in Freshservice??

 

Thank you for your response in advance!

Nurin

entry.title: Re: Import of Package Sales Analysis failed - Status Obje...
entry.content: Hi Guido,

entry.title: Re: SAP Customer Data Cloud Dataflow Custom Script
entry.content: Hi @S_Sarkar Custom data fields, if not encrypted, are also indexed and searchable in CDC, you may try it out in your query and check if the query performance is acceptable? This way you can skip those records in your dataflow.
